case_title: NALLELY MORENO CAMARILLO VS. PHILIPPE SIREAU

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE GIVEN) SERVED NOV-25-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SIREAU, PHILIPPE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY MORENO CAMARILLO, NALLELY AS TO DEFENDANT SIREAU, PHILIPPE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY MORENO CAMARILLO, NALLELY SIREAU, PHILIPPE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORENO CAMARILLO, NALLELY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SIREAU, PHILIPPE THE ORIGINAL AGREEMENT TO SHARE PG&E COSTS WAS THAT EACH ROOMATE WOULD PAY 1/3 OF THE MONTHLY PG&E BILL. THAT AGREEMENT WAS NOT AMENDED OR RE-NEGOTIATED. DEFENDANT IS RESPONSIBLE FOR 1/3 OF THE MONTHLY PG&E EXPENSES. DEFENDANT HAS PAID 1/3 OF PG&E COSTS FOR JULY--SEPTEMBER 2012. PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE DEFENDANT WITH COPIES OF PG&E BILL FOR OCTOBER & NOVEMBER SO HE CAN PAY HIS 1/3 SHARE OF THESE BILLS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2012 - JUDGMENT.
